headline: AMC filed a prospectus supplement registering the resale of up to 17,739,549 shares of Class A common stock by selling stockholders.
investor_impact: The registration of nearly 17.7 million shares for resale introduces a potential supply overhang, which could exert downward pressure on the stock price. Because this is a secondary sale, AMC will not receive any proceeds to improve its liquidity or reduce debt.
key_figures: 17,739,549 shares of Class A common stock
